positions.title: Software Engineer 2
description: Building AI/ML systems. Focus on ML/AI, NLP, and Agentic AI solutions.

positions.title: Software Engineer 1 / Data Scientist
description: Built an AI-driven data alerting platform for Microsoft, integrating a natural-language chatbot for data insights with prompt-based rule creation to detect anomalies and trigger notifications.
Designed scalable data pipelines using Spark, Delta Lake, and Databricks, reducing data processing time by 40% and enabling near real-time survey insights extraction.
Developed a production-ready predictive ML pipeline for PepsiCo for regression and classification (units sold, customer purchase likelihood).
Optimized forecasting models (ARIMA, SARIMAX, Prophet, XGBoost, LightGBM, LSTM/GRU), achieving 10–15% reduction in forecasting errors.
Collaborated with global clients (PepsiCo, Staples, Kimberly-Clark, Microsoft) on AI assistant chatbots and ML solutions.
Orchestrated AI agent integrations using LangChain and GPT APIs for phone-based interactions and CRM task automation.

positions.title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Developed computer vision algorithms for autonomous kamikaze drones using YOLOv5, Faster R-CNN, and ResNet; improved target recognition accuracy by 35%.
Enhanced AI-based Ground Control Stations for HALE drones with Reinforcement Learning (DQN, PPO), reducing mission planning time by 40%.
Designed a real-time AI-based stress detection system with sensor fusion (Random Forest, SVM, LSTM), achieving 90%+ accuracy.
Built a fighter airplane simulator with ML-Agents and CNN-based perception for pilot training. Contributed to Mehar Baba's Swarm Drone Competition (Indian Air Force).

positions.title: Software Engineer (Intern)
description: Digital marketing and tech: SEO, PPC, Google AdSense; created 1000+ backlinks. Built 5+ Python web scraping scripts (BeautifulSoup4) for Amazon, Flipkart, and other platforms.

positions.title: Freelance — Customer Support Associate
description: Supported 1000+ customer inquiries across two processes; focused on customer service, communication, and product knowledge.
